prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on furan (C₄H₄O, 9 atoms) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard', density-fit RI) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry taken from the user-supplied .xyz file as-is (single point, not re-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity check: trustworthy = true, all checks passed.

Key results:
• HOMO energy: −6.3597638 eV
• LUMO energy: −0.1024036 eV
• HOMO–LUMO gap (headline value): 6.2573602 eV
• Total energy: −230.11429 Hartree

These are Koopmans-theorem Kohn–Sham orbital energies, not measured ionisation energies or true excitation energies. Method: DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP // user-supplied geometry, gas phase, PySCF backend.
